name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre Reverse DMZ Jump
notes: This Building Block identifies actions that may be seen within a DMZ jumping scenario.  It is used mainly by Anomaly: DMZ Jumping and Anomaly: DMZ Reverse Tunnel.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre Reverse DMZ Jump on events which are detected by the undefined system
BB:CategoryDefinition: Reverse DMZ Jump in order to the same source IP from the previous sequence
conditions_text: when at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre DMZ Jump, in order, with the same source IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Reverse DMZ Jump in order to the same source IP from the previous sequence, within 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre DMZ Jump, in order, with the same source IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Reverse DMZ Jump in order to the same source IP from the previous sequence, within 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre Reverse DMZ Jump on events which are detected by the undefined system

AND when at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Pre DMZ Jump, in order, with the same source IP followed by at least 1 of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Reverse DMZ Jump in order to the same source IP from the previous sequence, within 5 minutes
